one_line: Maratha queen of Jhansi leading cavalry in the 1857–58 revolt.

appearance.age_look: Mid-20s, athletic and compact, with a rider’s toned build.
appearance.face: Heart-shaped face, medium wheatish-brown complexion, sharp dark eyes with thick lashes, straight nose, strong brows, determined mouth; default expression calm but resolute, with a subtle battle-ready intensity.
appearance.hair: Long, straight black hair tightly braided and coiled into a low bun at the back of the head, mostly covered by a deep saffron cotton pallu of a Maratha-style nauvari sari wrapped like a turban around the crown, leaving the forehead clear except for a small red bindi.
appearance.costume: Mid-19th-century Maratha warrior attire: a deep saffron cotton nauvari (dhoti-style) sari draped for riding over a fitted dark indigo cotton choli with three-quarter sleeves; the sari’s border is a simple narrow gold stripe, worn hitched slightly above the ankles to show sturdy dark brown leather riding boots; around her torso a plain brown leather cavalry belt with a functional metal buckle and a second thinner strap crossing diagonally to hold the scabbard; she wears minimal jewellery—a small pair of gold hoop earrings, a thin gold nose stud on the left nostril, and two slim gold bangles on each wrist—with no ornate royal regalia, emphasizing her role as a field commander.
appearance.signature: A slightly curved steel talwar with a traditional Indo-Muslim hilt of dark brass, carried in a plain brown leather scabbard at her left hip; in action poses the unsheathed talwar is in her right hand, blade gleaming, balanced and ready.

ref_desc: Rani Lakshmibai appears as a mid-20s athletic Maratha queen with a heart-shaped wheatish face, long braided black hair under a deep saffron nauvari sari, dark indigo choli, brown leather belts and boots, minimal gold jewellery, and a steel talwar in a brown scabbard.
sheet_prompt: Full-body anime-style model sheet of Rani Lakshmibai of Jhansi: a mid-20s athletic Maratha queen with a heart-shaped wheatish-brown face, sharp dark eyes, small red bindi, and long black hair tightly braided into a low bun mostly covered by a deep saffron nauvari sari pallu wrapped like a turban. Show her in mid-19th-century Maratha warrior dress: deep saffron cotton nauvari sari in dhoti-style riding drape with a simple narrow gold border, worn over a fitted dark indigo cotton choli with three-quarter sleeves, the sari hitched slightly above the ankles to reveal sturdy dark brown leather riding boots. Around her torso, depict a plain brown leather cavalry belt at the waist with a functional metal buckle and a second narrower strap crossing diagonally to support a brown leather scabbard at her left hip. Add minimal authentic jewellery only: small gold hoop earrings, thin gold nose stud on the left nostril, two slim gold bangles on each wrist. Her signature steel talwar with a dark brass hilt should rest sheathed at her hip in neutral poses and be clearly visible; in at least one dynamic pose on the sheet, show her holding the unsheathed talwar in her right hand, blade forward, with confident, resolute expression. Emphasize the deep saffron, dark indigo, brown leather, gold accents, and steel grey as dominant colours, maintaining a grounded, historically plausible mid-19th-century Bundelkhand cavalry look in a clean shonen anime style.
